title: microcybe multiflora
intro: Microcybe multiflora, also known as the woodland horseradish or multiflora horseradish, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible roots. The medicinal properties of Microcybe multiflora include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, relieve pain and inflammation, and support immune function. Microcybe multiflora can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
